query: fluorescent overhead lighting institutional office interior unflattering harsh
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: flat lighting — fluorescent institutional interiors, depressing offices/corridors, depthless cold light

response.objective_caption: A black and white interior photograph of a large office space with multiple rows of cubicles. Each workstation features desks, rolling office chairs, tall filing cabinets, and various items including boxes and paperwork. Fluorescent light panels illuminate the ceiling above lighter tiled walkways and darker carpeted work areas. The cubicle partitions create uniform enclosures that repeat into the background, and additional office furniture and supplies appear throughout the space.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A black and white interior photograph of a large office space captured through an extreme wide-angle fisheye lens with circular black vignetting. Multiple rows of cubicles contain desks, rolling chairs, filing cabinets, and office supplies under fluorescent ceiling lights, with tiled walkways alongside carpeted work areas. The unconventional framing curves the cubicle walls, ceiling grids, and floor tiles into arcs at the edges, while the extreme scale distortion compresses distant workstations and stretches nearby objects, creating a disorienting perspective that disrupts ordinary spatial relationships.
